scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-researched against developer.clickup.com's llms.txt-published full API Reference index (fetched 2026-07-04, ~140 documented endpoints) plus per-endpoint pages for every implemented action. New in this pass: 3 read streams (goals, space_tags, webhooks) and 19 write actions covering task/folder/list/space/webhook lifecycle mutations, task comments, tags, custom field values, and goal creation; capabilities.write flips true. ClickUp's real surface is large and covers many product areas (Chat, Docs, Views, Guests, legacy+new Time Tracking, Templates, Attachments, User Groups) that legacy never touched and that fall outside a reverse-ETL source connector's natural scope; every one of those is excluded below with a specific category and reason, not a blanket bucket.

excluded.reason: Lists nested within a Folder (getlists) -- distinct from the lists stream, which reads Get Folderless Lists (/v2/space/{space_id}/list, matching legacy's own folder-less scoping exactly); adding a folder-scoped sibling stream is deferred as breadth-vs-cost triage since legacy never modeled Folder-nested Lists at all
list-scoped task retrieval returning the identical task record shape the team-scoped tasks stream already covers; legacy only reads team-scoped tasks and this pass keeps that scoping
single-task detail; identical record shape to the tasks list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
cross-List/Folder/Space filtered task search returning the identical task record shape the team-scoped tasks stream already covers; a query-parameter variant, not a distinct resource
returns the Lists within a Folder, identical record shape to the lists stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-space detail; identical record shape to the spaces list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-list detail; identical record shape to the lists list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-goal detail (with its Targets); identical top-level record shape to the goals list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
authenticated-user profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
OAuth2 authorization-code token exchange; this connector authenticates via a personal API token, not the OAuth flow
multipart/form-data file upload; the dialect's write body_type is json/form/none, none of which express a binary multipart body
V3 multipart/form-data attachment upload to a task or File-type Custom Field; same multipart limitation as createtaskattachment
lists attachments for an entity; not part of legacy's parity surface and paired one-sidedly with an upload endpoint this pass cannot express; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
List-scoped comment listing; not part of legacy's parity surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
task comment listing (25-per-page, start/start_id cursor pagination); not part of legacy's parity surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
Chat-view comment listing, gated behind the excluded Views product area; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
threaded-comment replies; not part of legacy's parity surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
List-level comment creation; a lower-value near-duplicate of the already-covered create_task_comment write; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
Chat-view comment creation, gated behind the excluded Views product area; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
threaded-comment reply creation; a lower-value near-duplicate of the already-covered create_task_comment write; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
comment edit/assign/resolve; not part of legacy's parity surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
comment deletion; not part of legacy's parity surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
Custom Field discovery for a List (needed to resolve field_id/value shapes before calling set_custom_field_value); not part of legacy's parity surface, deferred as breadth-vs-cost triage
Custom Field discovery scoped to a Folder; same discovery purpose as the list-scoped variant already excluded
Custom Field discovery scoped to a Space; same discovery purpose as the list-scoped variant already excluded
Custom Field discovery scoped to a Workspace; same discovery purpose as the list-scoped variant already excluded
clears a Custom Field's value without deleting the field option itself; a lower-value complement to the already-covered set_custom_field_value write; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
Custom Task Type discovery (needed to interpret a task's custom_item_id); not part of legacy's parity surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
creates a Folder plus all its nested Lists/tasks from a template, an async bulk-provisioning operation rather than a plain single-resource mutation; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
creates a List from a template, async bulk-provisioning; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
creates a folderless List from a template, async bulk-provisioning; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
creates a task from a template; a lower-value near-duplicate of the already-covered create_task write; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
task template discovery, only useful in service of the excluded createtaskfromtemplate write; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
folder template discovery, same purpose class as the task-template discovery endpoint already excluded
list template discovery, same purpose class as the task-template discovery endpoint already excluded
creates a Target (key result) within a Goal; a lower-value sub-resource of the already-covered create_goal write; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
updates a Goal Target's progress; sub-resource of the already-covered goals surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
deletes a Goal Target; sub-resource of the already-covered goals surface; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
updates a Goal's name/due date/description/owners/color; a lower-value near-duplicate of the already-covered create_goal write's shape; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
deletes a Goal; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
